	+ x^5*(12650*x^46 - 8051*x^45 + 5107*x^44 + 49139*x^43 - 78947*x^42 + 160643*x^41 - 94383*x^40 + 30492*x^39 + 344157*x^38 - 734364*x^37 + 1770727*x^36 - 3338923*x^35 + 7572567*x^34 + 101373356*x^33 + 157003948*x^32 - 98471409*x^31 - 361443719*x^30 - 133227568*x^29 + 213664697*x^28 + 260212080*x^27 - 58983085*x^26 - 467670003*x^25 - 369094308*x^24 + 179145729*x^23 + 500257474*x^22 + 395368845*x^21 + 99384499*x^20 - 66124755*x^19 + 15389927*x^18 - 1662053*x^17 + 2382122*x^16 - 1931210*x^15 + 3753861*x^14 - 2240409*x^13 + 2882249*x^12 - 1179207*x^11 + 1644447*x^10 - 356262*x^9 + 826317*x^8 + 562*x^7 + 381053*x^6 + 87335*x^5 + 162461*x^4 + 59184*x^3 + 46927*x^2 + 11219*x + 3876)*y^8
	+ x^5*(2300*x^45 - 2700*x^44 + 5075*x^43 + 1351*x^42 - 6665*x^41 + 28599*x^40 - 36856*x^39 + 53868*x^38 - 16859*x^37 - 48111*x^36 + 264929*x^35 - 638219*x^34 + 1478272*x^33 + 23943624*x^32 + 38493150*x^31 - 20288846*x^30 - 73812235*x^29 - 32541655*x^28 + 34644652*x^27 + 55348676*x^26 - 5089294*x^25 - 93429962*x^24 - 76132394*x^23 + 29048722*x^22 + 91302606*x^21 + 86990686*x^20 + 17221352*x^19 - 4097072*x^18 - 409024*x^17 + 1804356*x^16 - 1689215*x^15 + 1504401*x^14 - 1038603*x^13 + 857845*x^12 - 528324*x^11 + 441588*x^10 - 229124*x^9 + 201260*x^8 - 75715*x^7 + 78625*x^6 - 14627*x^5 + 26965*x^4 + 1470*x^3 + 7854*x^2 + 1377*x + 969)*y^7
	+ x^5*(300*x^44 - 525*x^43 + 1313*x^42 - 1425*x^41 + 1937*x^40 - 257*x^39 - 920*x^38 + 5051*x^37 - 5541*x^36 + 4695*x^35 + 12865*x^34 - 51483*x^33 + 147532*x^32 + 4916281*x^31 + 7634662*x^30 - 3362711*x^29 - 12642541*x^28 - 6519684*x^27 + 4532360*x^26 + 9870874*x^25 + 265278*x^24 - 16353539*x^23 - 11962128*x^22 + 2380615*x^21 + 15937918*x^20 + 13958196*x^19 + 3899400*x^18 - 800512*x^17 + 588000*x^16 - 372964*x^15 + 291337*x^14 - 225874*x^13 + 186447*x^12 - 136881*x^11 + 104498*x^10 - 67287*x^9 + 47048*x^8 - 25479*x^7 + 16839*x^6 - 7051*x^5 + 4775*x^4 - 1167*x^3 + 1098*x^2 - 9*x + 171)*y^6
	+ x^5*(25*x^43 - 59*x^42 + 174*x^41 - 312*x^40 + 598*x^39 - 880*x^38 + 1369*x^37 - 1803*x^36 + 2582*x^35 - 3460*x^34 + 5355*x^33 - 8473*x^32 + 15070*x^31 + 823772*x^30 + 1235703*x^29 - 446429*x^28 - 1796136*x^27 - 1016468*x^26 + 368603*x^25 + 1612725*x^24 - 54053*x^23 - 2110429*x^22 - 1797706*x^21 + 258796*x^20 + 2089820*x^19 + 2048812*x^18 + 433501*x^17 + 62635*x^16 - 34810*x^15 + 44686*x^14 - 40550*x^13 + 33550*x^12 - 25143*x^11 + 18053*x^10 - 11896*x^9 + 7670*x^8 - 4445*x^7 + 2591*x^6 - 1276*x^5 + 678*x^4 - 260*x^3 + 134*x^2 - 29*x + 19)*y^5
	+ x^5*(x^42 - 3*x^41 + 10*x^40 - 23*x^39 + 52*x^38 - 101*x^37 + 191*x^36 - 333*x^35 + 566*x^34 - 915*x^33 + 1447*x^32 - 2211*x^31 + 3316*x^30 + 107081*x^29 + 164829*x^28 - 55770*x^27 - 190798*x^26 - 145384*x^25 + 34693*x^24 + 186255*x^23 + 2017*x^22 - 239345*x^21 - 193388*x^20 - 1275*x^19 + 250258*x^18 + 210056*x^17 + 62747*x^16 - 3960*x^15 + 7404*x^14 - 4834*x^13 + 3316*x^12 - 2211*x^11 + 1447*x^10 - 915*x^9 + 566*x^8 - 333*x^7 + 191*x^6 - 101*x^5 + 52*x^4 - 23*x^3 + 10*x^2 - 3*x + 1)*y^4
	+ x^18*(11480*x^15 + 15785*x^14 - 4179*x^13 - 16758*x^12 - 14294*x^11 + 1400*x^10 + 18116*x^9 - 1162*x^8 - 18802*x^7 - 18691*x^6 + 325*x^5 + 20504*x^4 + 19012*x^3 + 4110*x^2 + 430*x + 20)*y^3
	+ x^18*(861*x^14 + 1113*x^13 - 245*x^12 - 1022*x^11 - 1099*x^10 + 126*x^9 + 1107*x^8 + 10*x^7 - 1243*x^6 - 1143*x^5 - 65*x^4 + 1328*x^3 + 1165*x^2 + 220*x + 15)*y^2
	+ x^18*(42*x^13 + 49*x^12 - 7*x^11 - 43*x^10 - 51*x^9 + 6*x^8 + 44*x^7 + 4*x^6 - 54*x^5 - 45*x^4 - 5*x^3 + 55*x^2 + 47*x + 6)*y
	+ x^18*(x^12 + x^11 - x^9 - x^8 + x^6 - x^4 - x^3 + x + 1);
q:=(x*y - x + y + 1)/(x*y + x + y + 1);
t:=(x*y - x + y + 1)/(x*y + x - y - 1);
E:=[1,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,(q^2-1)*(t^2-1)/16,0,0];
P:=[(q+1)*(t^2-1)/8,(q+1)^2*(t-1)^2*(t+1)/32];
